name: Noctilucent Train Bleu Traveler
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>夜</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>や</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>光</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>こう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>列</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>れっ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>車</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しゃ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ブルートラベラー
desc: You can discard this card; add 1 "Train Connection" or "Revolving Switchyard" from your Deck or GY to your hand. You can only use this effect of "Noctilucent Train Bleu Traveler" once per turn. If this card is in your GY: You can target 1 other EARTH Machine monster in your GY; Special Summon both it and this card, also you cannot Special Summon from the Extra Deck for the rest of this turn, except Machine monsters. You can only use this effect of "Noctilucent Train Bleu Traveler" once per Duel.
mnst_eff: You can discard this card; add 1 "Train Connection" or "Revolving Switchyard" from your Deck or GY to your hand. You can only use this effect of "Noctilucent Train Bleu Traveler" once per turn. You can only use this effect of "Noctilucent Train Bleu Traveler" once per Duel.
eff: You can discard this card; add 1 "Train Connection" or "Revolving Switchyard" from your Deck or GY to your hand. You can only use this effect of "Noctilucent Train Bleu Traveler" once per turn. summoning: Special Summons itself from your Graveyard
Restricts the player's Special Summons from the Extra Deck
Restricts the player's Special Summons to Type specific monsters
